description: Tutorial lesson T2 (Musterin' da Boyz), mouse+keyboard player path: fresh tutorial game booted from the lesson's config (no fixture) -> Formations panel: attach Warboss to Boyz via the dropdown, tick Boyz into the Battlewagon, Confirm Formations (batch declares incl. DECLARE_TRANSPORT_EMBARKATION) -> deployment roll-off via the dialog Roll/Continue buttons -> deploy the Battlewagon (click board + Confirm) with the AI alternating -> deploy Gretchin with the Spread formation -> first-turn roll-off -> lesson complete. The Formations panel and roll-off dialog are embedded modal Windows: their buttons are driven via the emit escape hatch and the tie-tolerant roll steps emit only if the button is still present.

steps.comment: OptionButton popup menus are native Windows - select+emit is the dropdown escape hatch
the Formations panel is a modal embedded Window - synthetic root-viewport clicks cannot reach its controls; setting button_pressed emits toggled exactly like a click
tie tolerance: press the roll button if still up, else the A DEAD HEAT re-roll button; no-op when neither exists
Tight lays one rank of 5 per click - second rank
tie tolerance: press the roll button if still up, else the A DEAD HEAT re-roll button; no-op when neither exists
tie tolerance: press the roll button if still up, else the A DEAD HEAT re-roll button; no-op when neither exists
